metadata.name: Hatsune Miku (+Tainted)
metadata.description:
[h1]Hatsune Miku (+Tainted)[/h1]
A standalone character mod for The Binding of Isaac featuring Hatsune Miku and her tainted counterpart!
[h1]TAINTED MIKU FIXED FOR VANILLA[/h1]
Now when playing Vanilla Rep+, Tainted Miku's Lost Notes drops should work as intended!
[h1]INFO[/h1] I get a lot of comments like the games not launching or the mod breaks the game. Make sure you have all DLCs!
---------------------------------------------------------------------- [h2]Features[/h2]
[b]Hatsune Miku[/b] • Attacks with her voice with tears that resemble notes. • Each hit has a chance to [b]Charm[/b] enemies. • [b]Birthright Effect:[/b] Charmed enemies have a chance to permanently become your loyal [b]Fans[/b]! (until they die) • Use her active item, the [b]Microphone[/b], to inspire your audience!
[b]Tainted Miku (Work In Progress)[/b] • Having lost her voice, she starts the run firing highly unstable [b]Glitch Notes[/b]. • Slain enemies drop [b]Lost Notes[/b] onto the floor. • Collecting different Lost Notes grants various dynamic gameplay effects. • Use the [b]Broken Microphone[/b] to rapidly switch melodies.
---------------------------------------------------------------------- [h2]Mod Compatibility[/h2]
• [b]External Item Descriptions (EID):[/b] Full native support is included! • Notice any missing or incorrect descriptions? Please leave a comment.
---------------------------------------------------------------------- [h2]Planned[/h2]
• Finish and balance Tainted Miku's core gameplay loop. • Implement a unique Birthright effect for Tainted Miku. • Design and add more Miku-themed items to the item pools. • Upgrade custom sprites, animations, and special visual effects. • Overall balance tweaks and mechanical improvements.
You can checkout the Github Repository here [url=https://github.com/vulpya/isaac-miku]Source Code[/url]
---------------------------------------------------------------------- [h2]Disclaimer[/h2]
This is a non-commercial, fan-made mod created as a personal project for fun. All characters, names, and related properties belong to their original creators. This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by any official rights holders.
---------------------------------------------------------------------- [h2]Special Thanks[/h2]
• [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198102520074]ale[/url] — For creating the amazing Miku/Vocaloid sprites! • [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/thearexz]Arexz[/url] — For helping with custom sprite editing and refinement.
